# llms.txt v1
# Last updated: 2026-05-17
# Site: https://spectrix.d3labs.tech
# Contact: aakashgupta052004@gmail.com

## About
Spectrix helps backend teams monitor endpoint uptime, latency, and errors, then sends real-time alerts to Slack, Discord, or webhooks when something breaks. Setup in under 10 minutes. No credit card required.

## Quick Stats
- **Total Requests Monitored:** 245M+
- **Uptime SLA:** 99.99%
- **Avg Response Time:** 42ms

## Core Features
- **Endpoint Monitoring** – Health checks for critical routes
- **Latency Tracking** – Response-time trends and regressions
- **Error Tracking** – Failed checks and error spikes
- **Real-Time Alerts** – Slack, Discord, webhook notifications
- **Multi-Region Checks** – Run checks from multiple locations
- **Alert Rules** – Custom thresholds for downtime and latency

## Private Pages (Not for Crawling)
- /dashboard/*
- /login
- /register
- /api/* (internal endpoints)

## Use Cases
- Small SaaS teams monitoring auth, billing, and webhook endpoints
- Backend engineers tracking API regressions before customers report them
- DevOps teams needing lightweight alerting without heavy setup
